title: Parent to Parent Networking * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Parent to Parent Networking * Disabilities Issues 8 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Autism Spectrum Disorder Disabilities Issues Fathers Foster Parents Perinatal Depression Substance Use Disorder Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ARC LANE COUNTY FAMILIES CONNECTED/FAMILIAS EN CONEXION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support to parents who are raising a child with an intellectual and/or developmental disability and plan for a positive future. Helps families build community connections and connects families to events, information, and resources. 4181 E Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Familes with children 0-21 with intellectual or developmental disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, some events occur on the weekends Email (541) 343-5256 124 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK BEND OFFICE QUARTERLY FAMILY FUN DAYS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers quarterly events geared towards anyone whose life has been affected by disability. Events encourage people to interact and participate in activities such as movie night, picnic in the park, parades, BBQ with the Bend Elks, sensory friendly movies, other sensory friendly events, sledding, and other events. This provides networking opportunities for families. 2525 NE Twin Knolls Drive Suite 7 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Families and children with disabilities Hours: Varies by event Email (541) 548-8559 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK KLAMATH FALLS OFFICE QUARTERLY FAMILY FUN DAYS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers quarterly events geared towards anyone whose life has been affected by disability. Events encourage people to interact and participate in activities such as movie night, picnic in the park, parades, BBQ with the Bend Elks, sensory friendly movies, other sensory friendly events, sledding, and other events. This provides networking opportunities for families. 2701 Foothills Boulevard Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Families and children with disabilities Hours: Varies by event Email (541) 548-8559 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK WARM SPRINGS OFFICE QUARTERLY FAMILY FUN DAYS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers quarterly events geared towards anyone whose life has been affected by disability. Events encourage people to interact and participate in activities such as movie night, picnic in the park, parades, BBQ with the Bend Elks, sensory friendly movies, other sensory friendly events, sledding, and other events. This provides networking opportunities for families. 1257 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Families and children with disabilities Hours: Varies by event Email (541) 548-8559 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FACT OREGON FACT FAMILY NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support to caretakers, parents, siblings or anyone else that has a family member experiencing a disability by providing peer-delivered supports, knowledge, and resources. 2475 SE Ladd Avenue Suite 430 Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Caretakers, parents, siblings, or anyone else that has a family member experiencing a disability Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 786-6082 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK MID-OREGON REGION OFFICE REACH OUT OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a parent warmline offering peer support and connections to local resources, including one-to-one support, resource navigation, support groups, training, and advocacy. 4263 Commercial Street SE Suite 300 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Parents and caregivers raising children and youth with emotional, mental, behavioral, or other health needs Hours: Reach Out Oregon: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm. Closed holidays.
